description: Letter from Mūsā b. Abī al-Ḥayy, from Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Dating: around 1057. Regarding sending goods in leather sacks. Musa returned from the Maghreb. He is planning to travel to Tripoli. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, p. 519). Of the two fragments in the ENA 2805.8 enclosure, this is the upper one (Gil refers to it as "ENA 2805.8 A").
